summary:
The RIGHT-2 trial did not evaluate prehospital transdermal glyceryl trinitrate for stroke; such use has no established role in stroke management due to lack of evidence and its primary indication being cardiac conditions. Thus, it was ineffective as a stroke intervention.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only clinically relevant facts from the original response.) 

Final Answer: B
